chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 130 of 2005. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[s] 06.04.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Imran Qureshi advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi Asstt. Attorney General for Pakistan along with Abdullah Deputy MEO and Qalandar Bux Legal Assistant. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri A.A.G.Sindh. ------ Mr. Imran Qureshi learned counsel appearing for the petitioner submits that he has been instructed not to press this petition. The petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
